narrative:
Vinton County has 7,994 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.3% of registrants.
